title: Resident Prefetch Inflight Slot Guard

accepted_code_change.summary: _LightPrefetcher._fill uses actual pinned-ring inflight slot occupancy when deciding whether more frames can be submitted.

real_200_light_validation.command_common: --backend cuda --memory-mode resident --until-stage integration --local-normalization off --integration-rejection winsorized_sigma --integration-weighting none --flat-floor 0.05 --resident-registration similarity_cuda_triangle --resident-star-threshold 350 --resident-star-max-candidates 48 --resident-star-tolerance-px 3 --resident-ncc-sample-stride 4 --resident-warp-interpolation lanczos3 --reference-frame-id LIGHT_H_0136 --resident-output-maps audit

negative_probes_not_promoted.calibration_probe_result: batch32/streams8/wave8 and batch64/streams8/wave8 remained bitwise identical but regressed total runtime versus default.
negative_probes_not_promoted.warp_chunk_probe_result: chunk16/chunk32/chunk64 remained bitwise identical but did not beat the native preferred chunk8 default.

wbpp_reference_status.reason: Gate533 output maps are bitwise identical to the current default baseline that already passed the Gate532 scaled WBPP comparison.

cuda.gpu: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

known_limitations: Runtime win is small; this gate is a scheduling hygiene fix, not a headline speedup.
High-VRAM parameter sweeps did not identify a new default; the next large target remains resident registration/warp batching or light-loop Python orchestration.
